Free Consultation

Lost Money To Online Scammers?

Let's get your money back!

Important Update:
We are now handling the legal verification process of retreiving seized ESTD funds to scam victims.
The European Securities Treasury Division (ESTD) recently appointed The Legato to process and monitor the verifications protocols in order to ensure the return of stolen funds, illegally taken from online-trading victims, to its rightful owners.

Certified By the European Securities Treasury (Treasury-Division)
Under License Number: TDBS-8094519-RRI

Tell us your story

The form was sent successfully.
An error occured.

Who are we?

The Legato is an investigation and consulting firm.
Incorporated with official legal prosecutors and a conglomerate of highly experianced international law firms, specializing with retrieving stolen funds to its rightful owners. We pursue justice by hunting scammers, leading to freez and seizure of their assets in order to retrieve it back to their victims.
In many cases these prosecuted criminals end up behind bars while paying furthur compensations to scammed victims.

Let us make sure you get back what is rightfully yours!

How We Can Help You Get Your Money Back

Free Consultation

Begin the process by providing details on the incident

Evaluation

We examine the narrative of events and timeline of the scheme.

Action Plan

Our team of professionals will put together and present you with an efficient and swift method to recover your funds.

Investigation

Tracking down digital fingerprints, cyber analysis, determine the true identity and location of the involved perpetrators and complete the money trail puzzle.

Safe and Secure

With over 10,000 cases and global success The Legato is a world leading beacon of hope for scam victims.

Recover your Funds

We have created the most successful, secure and efficient process to get you your hard earned money.

Time to take action

About us

The Legato is a unique investigative and consulting firm, specializing with scam recovery. A conglomerate of investigators, cyber experts and a legal
team, partnering with international Wealth Recovery Solicitors.
Hired mainly by victims of online fraud to help them get their money back, but also working closly with international law enforcment agencies to bring justice. We helped numerous clients so far, and recovered a formidable amount of wealth. We are well known for our no-nonsense approach to confronting scammers in the effort to bring our clients’ money back.
We work fast, saving our clients a lot of legal fees, but most importantly, we find the scammers and get the job done for our clients!

Our Team

Experience professionals from law enforcement agencies, cyber units,
regulation and legal experts are only part of our unique team. The Legato currently employ over 140 employees that operates in 127 countries across the globe. In April 2020 The Legato teamed up with Georgiou&Sterling WRS (Wealth Recovery Solicitors), an international conglomerate of leading law firms based in the UK and Cyprus (EU). Georgiou&Sterling WRS provides our clients with the legal services and linking our cases with official legal prosecutors in 127 countries.
Our team of experts provides our clients with full guidance and support throughout the entire process.

Book free case consultation

Why Us

We Are Faster And It Will Save You Money

We Are Faster And It Will Save You Money We can save you tens of thousands of dollars in legal fees, and drastically reduce court case duration, by finding information faster. Our forensic evidence often prompts out-of-court settlements by the unmasked defendants.

Justice

If you have lost any money, we can identify the scammers, retrieve your funds but also claim jutice by handing the bad guys to official legal prosecutors!

Crypto Scams

We have highly skilled cybersecurity & blockchain investigators specializing in crypto scam investigation. If you are a victim of crypto investment scam, sent your crypto to wrong address or someone hacked your wallet, The Legato can recover your funds!

Satisfied clients, Proven Track Records

We have helped recovering millions of dollars for clients who got scammed just like you.

© 2022 The Legato All Rights Reserved.

Certified By the European Securities Treasury (Treasury-Division)
Under License Number: TDBS-8094519-RRI

Disclaimer: The Legato offers each new client a free consultation. Funds recovery or other services that will be subsequently commissioned will incur fees and/or commissions, based on the service and the complexity of each individual case. The Legato doesn’t offer any investments, financial advice. At The Legato we do not initiate calls without request. We only call clients that reached out to us. For UK residents only, The Legato does not assist consumers in making complaints about mis-sold investment products purchased from companies regulated by the Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) and / or the UK Financial Conduct. Authority (FCA), such as contracts for difference.

IMPORTANT NOTICE! Please note that there are other websites using our company name and we would like to notify the community. The Legato located in: 9 Rodopis Street, Engomi, 2415, Nicosia, Cyprus, operates only through the domain: cyberjustice.solutions
